asset_guidance.production_asset_note: Introduce production artwork through explicit design assets, not scraped screenshots.
asset_guidance.source_of_truth: The canonical contract is the source of truth. Inspiration assets remain reference material only.

component_guidance.button.primary: Treat as the singular main CTA treatment. Keep spacing and prominence consistent.
component_guidance.card.default: Use as the standard grouped surface for content clusters or modules.

principles: Keep semantic hierarchy visible in the theme and composable structure.
Use the contract as the source of truth for layout emphasis and interaction tone.
design_intent.summary: Implement the validated contract in Compose with a shared theme and reusable composable patterns, not per-screen reinvention.

implementation_notes: Prefer theme-backed values and reusable composables over screen-local visual overrides.
Keep motion and emphasis aligned with the calm, mobile-first design intent.

interaction_guidance.disabled.opacity: Disabled actions should remain understandable and not disappear into the background.
interaction_guidance.pressed.scale: Pressed feedback should be present but understated.

typography_guidance.app.body: Use for default content text and explanatory copy.
typography_guidance.app.display: Reserve for hero or onboarding emphasis. Keep it rare so it retains hierarchy value.
typography_guidance.app.title: Use for top-level screen and section titles.

visual_guidance.action.primary: Use as the dominant CTA color and keep it visually reserved for the most important action.
visual_guidance.surface.canvas: Use as the main screen background surface.
visual_guidance.surface.card: Use for grouped or elevated content modules.
visual_guidance.text.onAction: Use for text placed on action-colored surfaces with strong contrast.
